weapons.name: Club
weapons.cultural_connection: Found in primal tribes and peasant revolts. It represents the rawest form of defense.
weapons.special_skills: Concussive: On a crit, the target has disadvantage on their next attack.
weapons.limitations: Ineffective against heavy plate armor.

weapons.name: Dagger
weapons.cultural_connection: A universal tool. In some cultures, a 'Left-hand Dagger' is a symbol of a formal duelist.
weapons.special_skills: Hidden Strike: Advantage on Sleight of Hand to conceal the weapon.
weapons.limitations: Very short reach.

weapons.name: Greatclub
weapons.cultural_connection: Often wielded by Ogres and Hill Giants. A 'brutalist' weapon.
weapons.special_skills: Ground Slam: Can be used to knock prone a Tiny or Small creature.
weapons.limitations: Incredibly heavy and slow.

weapons.name: Handaxe
weapons.cultural_connection: Standard utility tool for woodcutters; a primary weapon for Dwarven 'Young-bloods'.
weapons.special_skills: Wood-Splitter: Deals double damage to non-magical wooden objects.
weapons.limitations: Poor aerodynamics compared to javelins.

weapons.name: Javelin
weapons.cultural_connection: The staple of Roman-style legions and desert nomads.
weapons.special_skills: Pila-Thrust: When thrown, ignores half-cover from shields.
weapons.limitations: Breaks easily if hit by heavy melee weapons.

weapons.name: Light Hammer
weapons.cultural_connection: The 'Artificer’s Sidearm'. Often a tool turned into a desperate weapon.
weapons.special_skills: Tool-Craft: Can be used for field repairs on armor.
weapons.limitations: Negligible damage against monsters with high HP.

weapons.name: Mace
weapons.cultural_connection: Standard armament for holy orders. Representing 'Just' violence.
weapons.special_skills: Skull-Crack: Ignores physical resistance on mindless undead (Zombies).
weapons.limitations: Unbalanced for throwing.

weapons.name: Quarterstaff
weapons.cultural_connection: Favored by mages and monks. Symbolizes wisdom over steel.
weapons.special_skills: Vault: Bonus to Athletics checks for jumping while equipped.
weapons.limitations: Requires two hands for decent damage.

weapons.name: Sickle
weapons.cultural_connection: The ritual blade of Druids. Used for harvesting moonlight herbs.
weapons.special_skills: Reaper: Bonus to gathering natural reagents/herbs.
weapons.limitations: Terrible reach.

weapons.name: Spear
weapons.cultural_connection: The most successful weapon in history. Used by everyone from kings to serfs.
weapons.special_skills: Brace: Ready an action to deal double damage to a charging foe.
weapons.limitations: Useless if the head is snapped off.

weapons.name: Crossbow, Light
weapons.cultural_connection: The equalizer. Allows a 10-year-old to kill a high-level knight.
weapons.special_skills: Mechanical Tension: Can be fired with no Strength requirement.
weapons.limitations: Reloading takes a full action for the untrained.

weapons.name: Dart
weapons.cultural_connection: A Ninjutsu/Monk classic. Used for delivering paralytic toxins.
weapons.special_skills: Quick-Toss: Can be thrown as a bonus action if already in hand.
weapons.limitations: Non-lethal without venom.

weapons.name: Shortbow
weapons.cultural_connection: The primary survival tool for Halflings and Goblins.
weapons.special_skills: Skirmish-Shot: No disadvantage if firing within 15ft.
weapons.limitations: Lacks the stopping power of a longbow.

weapons.name: Sling
weapons.cultural_connection: The Shepard's weapon. Stones are everywhere, making it the cheapest weapon.
weapons.special_skills: Silent Flight: Does not reveal location upon miss.
weapons.limitations: Poor damage against scaled monsters.

weapons.name: Battleaxe
weapons.cultural_connection: Iconic for Viking-style 'Raider' cultures.
weapons.special_skills: Topple: Can attempt to trip an enemy of Large size or smaller.
weapons.limitations: Heavier than a sword of the same size.

weapons.name: Flail
weapons.cultural_connection: A 'Holy Crusader' weapon. Impossible to block with standard shields.
weapons.special_skills: Shield-Wrap: Ignores the +2 AC bonus from shields.
weapons.limitations: Cannot be used to parry.

weapons.name: Glaive
weapons.cultural_connection: Ancient Elven and Samurai analogues. Elegant but deadly reach.
weapons.special_skills: Sweep: Attacks all targets in a 10ft semi-circle for half damage.
weapons.limitations: Clumsy in narrow hallways.

weapons.name: Greataxe
weapons.cultural_connection: The pride of Orcish Chieftains. Represents total carnage.
weapons.special_skills: Cleave: If you drop an enemy to 0, move leftover damage to a neighbor.
weapons.limitations: Huge 'tell' before swinging; easy to see coming.

weapons.name: Greatsword
weapons.cultural_connection: The Zweihänder. The ultimate sign of a professional mercenary.
weapons.special_skills: Graze: On a miss, you still deal your Strength mod in damage.
weapons.limitations: Requires massive strength to wield effectively.

weapons.name: Halberd
weapons.cultural_connection: Swiss-style polearm. The 'Swiss Army Knife' of the battlefield.
weapons.special_skills: Hook: Can pull a rider from their mount.
weapons.limitations: Weight makes it hard to use in water.

weapons.name: Lance
weapons.cultural_connection: A weapon of pure aristocracy. Only for the mounted elite.
weapons.special_skills: Charge: Double damage if you move 20ft in a straight line before hitting.
weapons.limitations: Disadvantage if the target is within 5ft.

weapons.name: Longsword
weapons.cultural_connection: The Knight's primary. Often 'Soul-bound' to families for generations.
weapons.special_skills: Sap: Chance to reduce target's next damage roll.
weapons.limitations: Standard; no major unique advantages over plate.

weapons.name: Maul
weapons.cultural_connection: Dwarven demolition tool. Used to break open fortress gates.
weapons.special_skills: Crush: Destroys non-magical shields on a critical hit.
weapons.limitations: Extremely high energy cost per swing.

weapons.name: Morningstar
weapons.cultural_connection: A 'fear' weapon. Designed to look as terrifying as it is lethal.
weapons.special_skills: Puncture: Ignores natural armor of beasts (thick hides).
weapons.limitations: Often gets stuck in bone/armor.

weapons.name: Pike
weapons.cultural_connection: The weapon of the phalanx. Useless alone, unbeatable in a line.
weapons.special_skills: Impale: Can strike two targets in a direct 10ft line.
weapons.limitations: Very heavy; nightmare to transport through forests.

weapons.name: Rapier
weapons.cultural_connection: The weapon of the 'Civilized Duel'. Seen in Elven courts and coastal trade cities.
weapons.special_skills: Vex: Grants advantage on your next attack if this one hits.
weapons.limitations: Cannot hack through solid obstacles.

weapons.name: Scimitar
weapons.cultural_connection: Favored by Dervishes and Sailors. Built for flow and speed.
weapons.special_skills: Nick: Allows a Light-weapon bonus attack without using a bonus action.
weapons.limitations: Weak against thick plate armor.

weapons.name: Shortsword
weapons.cultural_connection: Standard infantry sidearm. The 'Gladius'.
weapons.special_skills: Vex: Increases hit chance on successive strikes.
weapons.limitations: Minimal reach.

weapons.name: Trident
weapons.cultural_connection: Weapon of the Sea-Kings (Tritons). Often magically enchanted to call storms.
weapons.special_skills: Pin: Can pin a Medium target's foot to the ground on a crit.
weapons.limitations: Unbalanced for land-based parrying.

weapons.name: War Pick
weapons.cultural_connection: Dwarven 'Tunnel-fighter' weapon. Built to pierce the hide of stone-creatures.
weapons.special_skills: Armor-Pierce: Treats target AC as 2 lower if they wear Plate.
weapons.limitations: Limited to narrow stabbing motions.

weapons.name: Warhammer
weapons.cultural_connection: Dwarven masterpiece. Used for both smithing and war.
weapons.special_skills: Push: Can shove a target 10ft back on a successful hit.
weapons.limitations: Requires strong wrists; vibrates painfully on stone hits.

weapons.name: Whip
weapons.cultural_connection: Weapon of Beast-Tamers and Vampire Hunters.
weapons.special_skills: Slow: Reduces target's speed by 10ft until your next turn.
weapons.limitations: Zero damage to armored targets.

weapons.name: Longbow
weapons.cultural_connection: The pinnacle of Elven craftsmanship. Requires years of training.
weapons.special_skills: Slow: Aim for the legs to hinder movement from a distance.
weapons.limitations: Useless in heavy rain or underwater.

weapons.name: Crossbow, Hand
weapons.cultural_connection: Favored by Drow assassins. A symbol of lethal treachery.
weapons.special_skills: Vex: Perfect for dual-wielding with a dagger to gain advantage.
weapons.limitations: Very expensive and complex parts.

weapons.name: Crossbow, Heavy
weapons.cultural_connection: Castle defense weapon. Capable of killing a horse in one shot.
weapons.special_skills: Push: Knocks Medium enemies back 10ft.
weapons.limitations: Massive weight makes mobility difficult.

weapons.name: Pistol
weapons.cultural_connection: Gnomish engineering at its most volatile. A loud, smoking marvel.
weapons.special_skills: Smoke-Screen: Firing creates a 5ft cloud of light obscurement.
weapons.limitations: Loud noise alerts the entire dungeon; prone to misfire.

weapons.name: Musket
weapons.cultural_connection: The 'Dragon-stick'. Rare in most D&D settings except high-tech hubs.
weapons.special_skills: Heavy-Impact: Can stun targets with lower than 10 Constitution.
weapons.limitations: Ammunition is extremely expensive and rare.

weapons.name: Double-Bladed Scimitar
weapons.cultural_connection: Sacred weapon of the Valenar Elves. Non-elves carrying it are often hunted.
weapons.special_skills: Blade-Whirl: Allows a bonus action attack for 1d4 damage.
weapons.limitations: Requires 'Revenant Blade' feat to reach full potential (Finesse).

weapons.name: Yklwa
weapons.cultural_connection: Signature weapon of Chultan warriors. A short-shafted spear for jungle fighting.
weapons.special_skills: Bush-Strike: Advantage on attacks against targets in heavy foliage.
weapons.limitations: Terrible range compared to a standard spear.
